title: ottelia cordata
intro: Ottelia cordata, also known as the water wisteria or water hyacinth of Asia, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Hydrocharitaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ottelia cordata include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Ottelia cordata can be prepared into herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
